---
title: "Homework 8"
author: "Kimberly McNeil"
date: "3/27/2026"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: show
linkcolor: blue
urlcolor: blue
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo=TRUE}

# remember warning=FALSE and message=FALSE

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(Lock5Data)
library(dplyr)
```


# Numeric Data Analysis

## BMI Calculation

The following table details the first six rows for Sex, Weight, Height, and the newly added BMI from the Student Survey dataset:^[Question 1 Complete]

```{r}
bmi_data = StudentSurvey %>%
  mutate(BMI = round(701 * (Weight / Height^2), 1)) %>%
  select(Sex, Weight, Height, BMI)

kable(head(bmi_data), caption = "First 6 rows: Sex, Weight, Height, and BMI")
```
